name: Eternal Silence
author: RealVet

placementContext.reason: Eternal Silence re-imagines the legendary Silent Clubstep with unnerfed gameplay and modern technical decoration, creating a bridge between old-school history and current peak difficulty.

description: A technical masterpiece from RealVet and more, Eternal Silence features the unnerfed version of Silent Clubstep with high-detail 2.2-style structural decoration and atmospheric effects.
song: Silent Clubstep Deco Version by various
